'''âch-v-k-r''' ('''kachavkeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:etiolate|etiolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:etiolate|etiolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-v-k-r
|-
! Lemma
| kachavkeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichavkeroko|thichavkeroko]] || [[word:jichavkeroko|jichavkeroko]] || [[word:shichavkeroko|shichavkeroko]] || [[word:kichavkeroko|kichavkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchavkeroko|thuthuchavkeroko]] || [[word:jujuchavkeroko|jujuchavkeroko]] || [[word:shushuchavkeroko|shushuchavkeroko]] || [[word:kukuchavkeroko|kukuchavkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchavkeroko|thuchavkeroko]] || [[word:juchavkeroko|juchavkeroko]] || [[word:shuchavkeroko|shuchavkeroko]] || [[word:kuchavkeroko|kuchavkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchavkeroko|thuchavkeroko]] || [[word:juchavkeroko|juchavkeroko]] || [[word:shuchavkeroko|shuchavkeroko]] || [[word:kuchavkeroko|kuchavkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechavkeroko|thechavkeroko]] || [[word:jechavkeroko|jechavkeroko]] || [[word:shechavkeroko|shechavkeroko]] || [[word:kechavkeroko|kechavkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochavkeroko|thothochavkeroko]] || [[word:jojochavkeroko|jojochavkeroko]] || [[word:shoshochavkeroko|shoshochavkeroko]] || [[word:kokochavkeroko|kokochavkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochavkeroko|thochavkeroko]] || [[word:jochavkeroko|jochavkeroko]] || [[word:shochavkeroko|shochavkeroko]] || [[word:kochavkeroko|kochavkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochavkeroko|thochavkeroko]] || [[word:jochavkeroko|jochavkeroko]] || [[word:shochavkeroko|shochavkeroko]] || [[word:kochavkeroko|kochavkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchavkeroko|thĂŠchavkeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠchavkeroko|jĂŠchavkeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠchavkeroko|shĂŠchavkeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠchavkeroko|kĂŠchavkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachavkeroko|thathachavkeroko]] || [[word:jajachavkeroko|jajachavkeroko]] || [[word:shashachavkeroko|shashachavkeroko]] || [[word:kakachavkeroko|kakachavkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachavkeroko|thachavkeroko]] || [[word:jachavkeroko|jachavkeroko]] || [[word:shachavkeroko|shachavkeroko]] || [[word:kachavkeroko|kachavkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachavkeroko|thachavkeroko]] || [[word:jachavkeroko|jachavkeroko]] || [[word:shachavkeroko|shachavkeroko]] || [[word:kachavkeroko|kachavkeroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
